From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

(Redirected from [Divizia B 1955](/w/index.php?title=Divizia_B_1955&redirect=no "Divizia B 1955"))

16th season of the Divizia B, the second tier of the Romanian football league

Football league season

[Divizia B](/wiki/Liga_II "Liga II")

| Relegated | [Flamura Roșie Sfântu Gheorghe](/w/index.php?title=Flamura_Ro%C8%99ie_Sf%C3%A2ntu_Gheorghe&action=edit&redlink=1 "Flamura Roșie Sfântu Gheorghe (page does not exist)") [Flamura Roșie Cluj](/wiki/Dermata_Cluj "Dermata Cluj") [Flamura Roșie Buhuși](/wiki/Flamura_Ro%C8%99ie_Buhu%C8%99i "Flamura Roșie Buhuși") [Locomotiva Craiova](/w/index.php?title=Locomotiva_Craiova&action=edit&redlink=1 "Locomotiva Craiova (page does not exist)") [Metalul Baia Mare](/wiki/CS_Minaur_Baia_Mare_(football) "CS Minaur Baia Mare (football)") [Avântul Fălticeni](/wiki/Foresta_F%C4%83lticeni "Foresta Fălticeni") [Știința Craiova](/wiki/CS_Universitatea_Craiova "CS Universitatea Craiova") [Metalul Oradea](/wiki/%C3%8Enfr%C4%83%C8%9Birea_Oradea "Înfrățirea Oradea") [Dinamo Galați](/wiki/Siderurgistul_Gala%C8%9Bi "Siderurgistul Galați") [Metalul București](/wiki/Faur_Bucure%C8%99ti "Faur București") [Metalul 108 Cugir](/wiki/CF_Metalurgistul_Cugir "CF Metalurgistul Cugir") [Locomotiva Galați](/wiki/Gloria_CFR_Gala%C8%9Bi "Gloria CFR Galați") [Metalul Arad](/wiki/Vagonul_Arad "Vagonul Arad") |

The **1955 [Divizia B](/wiki/Divizia_B "Divizia B")** was the 16th season of the second tier of the [Romanian football league system](/wiki/Romanian_football_league_system "Romanian football league system").

The format has been maintained to three series, one of them having 14 teams and two of them only 13. At the end of the season the winners of the series promoted to [Divizia A](/wiki/Liga_I "Liga I"), the last four places from the first and third series and the last five places from the second series relegated to [Divizia C](/wiki/Liga_III "Liga III"). This was the sixth season played in the spring-autumn system, a system imposed by the new leadership of the country which were in close ties with the [Soviet Union](/wiki/Soviet_Union "Soviet Union").[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)

### Renamed teams

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1955_Divizia_B&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Renamed teams")]

*Metalul Câmpina* was renamed as [Flacăra Câmpina](/wiki/FCM_C%C3%A2mpina "FCM Câmpina").

*Metalul Ploiești* was renamed as [Flacăra 1 Mai Ploiești](/wiki/Prahova_Ploie%C8%99ti "Prahova Ploiești").

*Spartac Burdujeni* was renamed as [Flamura Roșie Burdujeni](/wiki/Flamura_Ro%C8%99ie_Burdujeni "Flamura Roșie Burdujeni").

*Spartac Focșani* was renamed as [Progresul Focșani](/wiki/CSM_Foc%C8%99ani "CSM Focșani").

*Voința București* was renamed as [Progresul CPCS București](/w/index.php?title=Progresul_CPCS_Bucure%C8%99ti&action=edit&redlink=1 "Progresul CPCS București (page does not exist)").
